title: Biogears Unlimited
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Biogears Unlimited''' was a [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineering]] corporation working for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was a relatively new company by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and was bankrolled by the Empire. One of their major works was the production of [[bio-hound]]s.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1991-06-XX -->[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide (sourcebook)|''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide'']]
